desc: A small grey mouse darts between cracks in the broken floorboards, whiskers twitching.

A small brown rabbit nibbles at the weeds pushing through the untended soil. Its ears swivel at every sound, ready to bolt at the first sign of danger.

A small grey mouse scampers between the wheat stalks, nose to the ground in search of fallen grain.

A small rabbit crouches between the rows of golden wheat, nibbling on fallen grain. It watches you with bright, wary eyes.

A small grey mouse skitters across the dusty earth between the cotton plants, pausing now and then to listen.

A rabbit sits among the cotton plants, its brown fur dusted with white fibres. It twitches its nose at you before returning to nibbling on a leaf.
